about_page_description: Learn about Hai Enterprise's journey, team, and vision.
about_intro: We are a technology company focused on enterprise digital transformation, delivering high-quality services and solutions.
about_vision_content: To become a leading enterprise service provider and drive business innovation with technology.
about_mission_content: Help every enterprise upgrade digitally, improve operational efficiency, and create greater value.

services_item_software_desc: Build tailored software systems based on your business requirements.
services_item_cloud_desc: Cloud architecture, migration, and operations services for stable business operations.

news_article_2_summary: After more than a year of R&D, our new cloud platform is officially released.
news_article_3_title: Strategic Partnership with a Large Enterprise
news_article_3_summary: Both sides will collaborate in cloud computing, big data, and AI to drive digital transformation.
news_article_4_summary: The annual tech salon attracted over 500 developers to discuss cutting-edge trends.
